title: Courageous Connection
definition: The drive of an enlightened individual to connect and communicate their insights, breaking the traditional solitary nature of Paccekabuddhas.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A Buddha's willingness to share their wisdom with others, even if it goes against tradition.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The courage of an enlightened being to communicate their insights, challenging the traditional solitary nature of Paccekabuddhas.
difficulty_levels.expert: The extraordinary act of an enlightened individual to share their wisdom, defying the conventional silence and solitude of Paccekabuddhas.

extra_fields.insight: An enlightened individual may choose to communicate their insights, challenging the traditional solitary nature of Paccekabuddhas.
